name: part_010
file: tmp_【3D LIVE CONCERT 生誕ライブ】FUWAMOCO wacha wacha birthday festival 🎂🐾 【#FWMCbday26】 [7M4E3WGWlRM]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_010.webm

scenes.description: FuwaMoco and Kuro-chan have a talk segment where they discuss Kuro-chan's career, his resemblance to the mascot Pero, and his dream of becoming an idol.
FuwaMoco and Kuro-chan perform the song "Chu, Tayousei" by ano.

subtitles.original: 言い訳はなし！
subtitles.english: No excuses!

subtitles.original: 聞いてる？人の話！
subtitles.english: Are you listening? To what I'm saying!

subtitles.original: 頑張って！
subtitles.english: Good luck!

subtitles.original: えっと、なんだろう... えっと...
subtitles.english: Uh, what should I say... Uh...

subtitles.original: Famous Comedian!
subtitles.english: Famous Comedian!

subtitles.original: Idol Producer!
subtitles.english: Idol Producer!

subtitles.original: やってるしんよ！
subtitles.english: He's actually doing it!

subtitles.original: できるしんよ！
subtitles.english: He can do it!

subtitles.original: クロちゃんテレビでよく見てるけど...
subtitles.english: We often see Kuro-chan on TV, but...

subtitles.original: ちょっとフワモコのペットのペロちゃんと、えっと、ちょっと似てるところがたくさんあるね！
subtitles.english: There are a lot of similarities to FuwaMoco's pet, Pero-chan!

subtitles.original: ちょっと後ろの飾り見てください！見えますか？
subtitles.english: Please look at the decorations behind us! Can you see them?

subtitles.original: そっくりでペロです！ペロ！
subtitles.english: He's a spitting image of Pero! Pero!

subtitles.original: ちょっと待って！球体というか、丸いところが似てるだけじゃない？
subtitles.english: Wait a minute! Isn't it just that he's spherical, or round, that's similar?

subtitles.original: そうじゃない！
subtitles.english: That's not it!

subtitles.original: 本当？
subtitles.english: Really?

subtitles.original: えっとクロちゃんと似てるところは、嘘つきで、女の子好きで、やらしい... うん！
subtitles.english: The similarities to Kuro-chan are: a liar, a lady-killer, and lecherous... yep!

subtitles.original: だからね、見た目で騙されないで！クロちゃんはそれで大丈夫なの？言われて...
subtitles.english: So, don't be fooled by appearances! Is it okay for Kuro-chan to be told that?

subtitles.original: いや、ひどい！悲しくなってきた！え〜ん、え〜ん、え〜ん！
subtitles.english: No, that's mean! I'm getting sad! Waaah, waaah, waaah!

subtitles.original: エンポコエンフン！
subtitles.english: En-po-ko-en-fu!

subtitles.original: 全然人のギャグを聞かないよね、君たちは！
subtitles.english: You guys really don't listen to other people's gags!

subtitles.original: できればクロちゃんはペロの友達になってくれませんか？
subtitles.english: If possible, won't you become Pero's friend, Kuro-chan?

subtitles.original: フワモコの友達じゃなくて、ペロの友達になるの？
subtitles.english: Not FuwaMoco's friend, but Pero's friend?

subtitles.original: フワモコはクロちゃんと友達になりたくないから！
subtitles.english: Because FuwaMoco doesn't want to be friends with Kuro-chan!

subtitles.original: おかしくない、それ？
subtitles.english: Isn't that strange?

subtitles.original: いやいや、気持ち悪いから！
subtitles.english: No, no, because it's gross!

subtitles.original: 気持ち悪くない！マニアには受ける！
subtitles.english: It's not gross! Enthusiasts will love it!

subtitles.original: 違う！フワモコ気持ち悪いやっぱり！
subtitles.english: No! FuwaMoco thinks it's gross after all!

subtitles.original: でもモコちゃん、ちょっとやりすぎですよ、失礼です！
subtitles.english: But Mococo-chan, that's a bit too much, it's rude!

subtitles.original: いや、もしもしペロと仲良くなってほしいんだったら、フワモコちゃん、クロちゃんに可愛く頼んだほうがいいんじゃない？
subtitles.english: Well, if you want me to get along with Pero, shouldn't FuwaMoco-chan ask Kuro-chan cutely?

subtitles.original: はぁ？ NO！
subtitles.english: Hah? NO!

subtitles.original: えっ、NO？
subtitles.english: Eh, NO?

subtitles.original: NO！
subtitles.english: NO!

subtitles.original: しっかりとした否定！
subtitles.english: A firm rejection!

subtitles.original: NO！
subtitles.english: NO!

subtitles.original: ま、けどペロ可愛いから仲良くなってもいいと思ってるよ！
subtitles.english: Well, but Pero is cute, so I think it's okay for us to get along!

subtitles.original: あ、嬉しい嬉しい嬉しい！
subtitles.english: Oh, happy happy happy!

subtitles.original: 可愛くないけど、なんか仲良くなってくれたら嬉しいかな！
subtitles.english: He's not cute, but I'd be happy if you guys got along!

subtitles.original: 感情が、感情がいろいろありすぎるのよ、本当に！
subtitles.english: There are just too many, too many different emotions, really!

subtitles.original: まあまあ！クロちゃんって芸人さんだけど、アイドルになりたいんですよね？ねっ！
subtitles.english: Anyway! Kuro-chan, you're a comedian, but you want to be an idol, right?

subtitles.original: そう、もともとアイドルなろうと思ったのに、騙されて芸人にさせられたから、アイドルは本当に夢、ドリーム！
subtitles.english: Yes, I originally intended to be an idol, but I was tricked into becoming a comedian, so being an idol is truly my dream, DREAM!

subtitles.original: なんか悲しいな、かわいそう！
subtitles.english: That's kind of sad, poor guy!

subtitles.original: でもドリームって大事ですからね！
subtitles.english: But dreams are important!

subtitles.original: 大事！
subtitles.english: Important!

subtitles.original: さ、で、まあクロちゃんのドリームはアイドルなんだから、もうせっかく一緒に歌ってくれませんか？
subtitles.english: So, well, since Kuro-chan's dream is to be an idol, won't you please sing with us since you're here?

subtitles.original: いいしんや、いいしんや！ オッケーだししんや！
subtitles.english: Good, good! It's okay!

subtitles.original: え、なに？ うん、この曲と踊らなきゃね！
subtitles.english: Eh, what? Yeah, we have to dance to this song!

subtitles.original: えっ、何？ この曲と踊るのね？
subtitles.english: Eh, what? Dance to this song?

subtitles.original: あの、ハードル上げないで！
subtitles.english: Um, don't raise the bar!

subtitles.original: 大丈夫ですよ、ね？
subtitles.english: It'll be fine, right?

subtitles.original: アイドルのプロデュースもやってるし！
subtitles.english: Since you're also an idol producer!

subtitles.original: そうそう！
subtitles.english: True, true!

subtitles.original: 実力見せてよ！
subtitles.english: Show us your skills!

subtitles.original: 見せて！
subtitles.english: Show us!

subtitles.original: オッケーだししんや、行くしんや、行くしんや！
subtitles.english: Okay, let's go, let's go!

subtitles.original: オッケー！
subtitles.english: Okay!

subtitles.original: じゃあ、すごく可愛い曲を一緒に歌いましょう！
subtitles.english: Then, let's sing a very cute song together!

subtitles.original: え、何の曲？ 楽しみ！
subtitles.english: Eh, what song? I'm excited!

subtitles.original: オッケー！
subtitles.english: Okay!

subtitles.original: じゃあ、一緒にタイトルコールしましょうね！
subtitles.english: Then, let's do the title call together!

subtitles.original: ね！
subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: うん！
subtitles.english: Yep!

subtitles.original: せーの！ ちゅ、多様性。
subtitles.english: One, two! Chu, Tayousei.

subtitles.original: ちゅ、多様性やるの？
subtitles.english: We're doing Chu, Tayousei?

subtitles.original: 我愛你 酔いが醒めない
subtitles.english: I love you, I can't sober up

subtitles.original: Oh, I need you 恋が醒めない
subtitles.english: Oh, I need you, this love won't fade

subtitles.original: お星様様のなれ果て 挿して
subtitles.english: Stick in the ruins of the stars

subtitles.original: 無問題 破裂してみて
subtitles.english: No problem, try bursting

subtitles.original: Hold me tight トラウマの味
subtitles.english: Hold me tight, the taste of trauma

subtitles.original: 猛反対 お手お座りでハイ❤報酬
subtitles.english: Strong opposition, give me your hand, sit, here's your ❤ reward

subtitles.original: 喉の奥がチクンチクン
subtitles.english: The back of my throat is tingling

subtitles.original: 僕はドクンドクン
subtitles.english: My heart is thumping

subtitles.original: 鼓動で孤独 消してみてよ
subtitles.english: Try to erase my loneliness with your heartbeat

subtitles.original: 愛も恋も毒殺して
subtitles.english: Poison both affection and love

subtitles.original: 僕を独占して
subtitles.english: Monopolize me

subtitles.original: このまま中毒になるまでチューしよ
subtitles.english: Let's keep kissing until we become addicted

subtitles.original: そして Get get get on, Get get get on, Get on chu!
subtitles.english: And get get get on, get get get on, get on chu!

subtitles.original: 熱く とろけるくらいに溢れた気持ちが
subtitles.english: Emotions overflowing so hot they're melting...

subtitles.original: たまらないでしょ
subtitles.english: ...it's unbearable, right?

subtitles.original: Get get get on, Get get get on, Get on chu!
subtitles.english: Get get get on, get get get on, get on chu!

subtitles.original: 我愛你 無問題 Get Get Get on chu!
subtitles.english: I love you, no problem, get get get on chu!

subtitles.original: ポン・チー・カン 勝負はいつも
subtitles.english: Pon, chi, kan, the game is always...

subtitles.original: トンチンカン 僕に言わせりゃ
subtitles.english: ...ridiculous, if you ask me...

subtitles.original: チンプンカンプンだね 最後はロンでしょ？
subtitles.english: ...it's all gibberish, the end is a win (ron), right?

subtitles.original: もう何回 やられればいい？
subtitles.english: How many more times should I be beaten?

subtitles.original: Oh, One night 忘れられない
subtitles.english: Oh, one night, I can't forget
